body.title: Reading extraction prompt permits 0-node output; revise to enforce 'every chunk yields something'
body.result: Prompt rules revised: minimum 1 node/chunk enforced, 'skip obvious truisms' removed, confidence guidance lowered to match the 0.60 deposit filter, watch-list topics explicitly surfaced inside the prompt. No pass-2 change (already permissive per D333). Commit 5f1518e8. Next smoke run should validate >=1 node/chunk.
body.description:
After removing the attractor zero-gate and populating the watchlist, a 1-chunk qwen extraction run STILL returned 0 nodes. The _deposit_nodes confidence filter (<0.60) is one layer, but the real source is the prompt itself:

  '_EXTRACT_PROMPT: 0-5 nodes max per chunk. Quality over quantity.'
  'Minimum confidence 0.65 to include a node.'
  'Skip: plot summaries, obvious truisms, author biography, hedged speculation.'

Qwen follows these rules faithfully and can judge an entire passage as 'obvious truism' or 'below 0.65 confidence' — outputting zero nodes. That violates Akien's principle: 'there's nothing I read that I don't get anything at all from.'

## Fix direction
Change '0-5 nodes max' → '1-5 nodes (at minimum one — every passage has at least one insight worth capturing; if the obvious one seems too obvious, capture it anyway)'.

Soften 'Skip: obvious truisms / hedged speculation' — those might be exactly what Igor's watchlist wants captured for a reader-as-Akien perspective.

Keep the 0.65 confidence floor; it's fine as a quality hint, but if qwen honestly can't hit 0.65 on any node, the prompt should still require at least one low-confidence extraction rather than silently emitting an empty list.

## Not in this ticket
- Prompt-engineering the pass-2 'situated' variant (D333) — separate.
- Switching extractor model — we just committed to qwen.

## Acceptance
- A smoke test chunk that previously returned 0 nodes now returns ≥1 node
- Prompt wording matches Akien's 'every book yields something' principle
- Confidence field is still honest (can be 0.5 if that's what's warranted)

## Provenance
Discovered 2026-04-18 ~21:10 when post-gate-removal smoke test still returned 0 nodes. Prompt inspection revealed the '0-5 nodes max' / 'skip truisms' rules were the silent cause.
